summary: Comprehensive testing of GPGT e-commerce mega menu feature. All mega menu functionalities working correctly - menu appears on hover, shows 8 categories with icons, hover changes right panel, and navigation works. Other features (cart, login, admin) also verified working.
passed_tests: Mega menu appears on hover over 'Products' navigation item
Mega menu shows all 8 categories on left side (Sanitaryware, Electrical, Lightings, Safety, Tools, Plumbing, Paints, Hardware)
Categories display with correct icons (Droplets, Zap, Lightbulb, Shield, Wrench, Pipette, Paintbrush, Hammer)
Hovering over categories changes active category panel on right with image, title, product count
Quick links in mega menu (All Products, Budget Friendly, New Arrivals, Best Sellers) displayed correctly
Shop All [Category] button displayed for active category
Clicking on category links navigates to correct product listing with category filter
Products page shows correct filtered results with category name in breadcrumb
Homepage loads with hero section and categories
Products page shows product grid with 8 products and discount badges
Product detail page displays correctly with price, description, add to cart button
Add to cart button works - shows 'Added to cart' toast and updates cart badge count
Cart functionality working - cart icon shows item count
Login functionality with admin credentials admin@gpgt.ae / admin123 works
Admin dashboard accessible after login - shows 'Welcome back!' toast
Admin dashboard displays stats (8 Products, 2 Orders, 1 Customer, AED 0.00 Revenue)
Admin panel navigation cards for Products, Orders, Categories, Settings visible
critical_code_review_comments: Mega menu implementation follows good practices with data-testid attributes for testing
Category hover state uses onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave correctly
MegaMenu component is properly isolated and receives categories as props
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data - admin@gpgt.ae / admin123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mega menu features verified working. Backend APIs confirmed functional via previous testing iterations. The app has 8 categories with 1 product each. Login with admin@gpgt.ae / admin123 for admin access.

features_verified.mega_menu_hover: PASS - Menu opens when hovering over Products nav item
features_verified.mega_menu_categories: PASS - All 8 categories displayed with icons
features_verified.mega_menu_panel_change: PASS - Right panel updates when hovering over different categories
features_verified.mega_menu_navigation: PASS - Clicking category navigates to filtered product list
features_verified.homepage: PASS - Hero section and categories displayed
features_verified.products_page: PASS - Shows 8 products in grid with discount badges
features_verified.add_to_cart: PASS - Works correctly with toast notification
features_verified.login: PASS - Admin login with correct credentials redirects to admin dashboard
features_verified.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats and management links
